jd_excerpt:
Forward Deployed AI Engineer

We are looking for a Forward Deployed AI Engineer to work directly with our largest customers, scoping ambiguous problems and shipping production agentic systems on top of Claude. You will own the full lifecycle: discovery sessions with customer engineering teams, architecture, build (Python + FastAPI), deploy, and iterate on production telemetry. Required: 3-5 years of software experience, deep Python, demonstrated ability to build LLM-driven systems (LangGraph, LangChain, or equivalent), tool calling, RAG, and structured outputs. Bonus: prior MCP or agent-to-agent integration work.

eligibility_verdict.reason: Strong fit; FDE role family with required skills directly matching candidate's HapTag agentic work.
eligibility_verdict.explanation: Role family is Forward-Deployed Engineer, which is in the candidate's preferred set. Required Python + LangGraph + RAG + tool-calling + structured outputs all map cleanly to the HapTag stories (multi-agent threat triage, MCP connectors, RAG with semantic caching). YoE bound 3-5 is squarely within the candidate's range. No hard or soft blockers detected.

selected_stories.resume_bullet: Built production multi-agent LangGraph pipeline for threat triage; processed 1K+ events/day at 94% validity with tool calling and safe-execution guardrails.
Designed RAG pipeline on pgvector with HNSW indexing and semantic caching; cut LLM cost ~60% and held similarity search under 200ms.
Designed MCP connectors with versioned tool contracts and agent-to-agent orchestration; exposed internal tools to AI agents safely with auth and audit logging.
Translated ambiguous customer asks into shipped agentic systems; owned discovery, scoping, build, and deployment end-to-end.
Built agentic summarization workflows (LangChain/CrewAI) for enterprise use; designed to fit cloud and compliance constraints.
Built LLM-powered RAG search over enterprise documentation; cut onboarding lookup from ~15 min to under 30 sec.
Built AI-augmented tooling for credit-risk analysts in a regulated Azure environment; designed for compliance, auditing, and governance from the start.
Led technical architecture discussions with product owners and architects; produced reference implementations that drove broader AI adoption.
Built enterprise SaaS (React + Spring Boot) for the Pearson platform; served 200K+ users at 99.7% uptime.
Designed event-driven architecture of 12 microservices on Kafka handling 50K+ events/hour.
Built serverless AWS pipeline (Lambda, SQS, Glue) absorbing 12x traffic spikes with zero data loss.
Owned full-stack features end-to-end (Python, React, Node, PostgreSQL) in an early-stage environment.
Built JobFlow, a ~13K-line Python pipeline automating JD analysis, resume generation, ATS scoring, and multi-ATS application submission.
Built a GTM intelligence agent (TypeScript, Node, Express, OpenRouter) with an MLOps roadmap.

ats_score.gap_summary: All 7 high-priority required keywords are surfaced. 'structured-outputs' was not surfaced verbatim; consider adding to the FastAPI bullet on retry. Cosine similarity strong; section completeness fully covered.
